Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Easy to apply pre-cut double-sided squares that lends itself to a wide range of projects and crafts. With the same strong, permanent bond of our Crystal-Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape. Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out, and is even stronger than our Clear Double-Sided Mounting Tape. Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out, and is even stronger than our Clear Double-Sided Mounting Tape. Gorilla Tape Crystal Clear is perfect for professionals, DIY, crafting and everyday uses. You can patch a conservatory roof, seal inflatables, repair camping equipment and more! Water Resistant ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ 100% Waterproof Key Features 2.5x longer compared to our standard Crystal-Clear Double-Sided Mounting Tape 24 double sided pre-cut squares for quick application & bonding High strength double-sided crystal-clear tape for fast and easy permanent bonds Heavy-duty double-sided tape for fast, easy permanent bonds indoor & out. Flexible, high strength, hand tearable & even sticks under water*. *Surfaces must be clean, smooth, non-porous and water must be rubbed/pressed out from underneath the tape. Bonds Glass, brick, metal, stone, wood, plastics*, ceramic and more. *Not for use on polyethylene & polypropylene plastics.
